element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players must learn weapon systems, fuel management, and radar signature trade-offs before engaging
Visual radar signature comparison system teaches threat assessment; critical for stealth gameplay
AI units patrol predictably before detection; teaches route planning and timing
Static defensive positions teach evasion and ordnance selection strategy
Aggressive AI behavior after detection; requires flight model mastery
Detection triggers international incidents; adds tension to stealth requirement

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Tension-based: long periods of cautious approach with high stress on stealth maintenance, punctuated by acute danger moments when detected. Difficulty setting (cold war vs. conventional) modulates tension baseline.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Multiple geographic mission locations (Libya, Persian Gulf, North Cape, Central Europe) with varying threat layouts; player chooses engagement approach

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial missions with preset equipment teach flight dynamics, radar mechanics, and basic mission structure with reduced enemy awareness
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Standard missions across varied geographic locations; player manages ordnance selection, fuel efficiency, and multi-threat environments
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex mission scenarios requiring coordination of stealth approach, SAM avoidance, air-to-air threat management, and extraction timing
notable_spikes: First detection by enemy radar (transition from stealth to evasion)
Cold War mode: any detection triggers diplomatic failure

notable_level_patterns.description: Player must navigate to objective while maintaining radar signature below detection threshold; emphasis on route planning and timing enemy patrols
Multiple SAM sites and patrol routes create decision points: avoid entirely (stealth), suppress (ordnance use), or evade (flight skill)
After objective completion, player must extract via designated route or face consequences; timing and fuel management critical
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All mission types with SH-3 Sea King rescue option

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple end-states based on mission success/failure: rescue, capture (Pravda headline), diplomatic incident, or pilot fatality (permanent loss)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All missions; persistent pilot roster tracks outcomes
